title: Graduate Product Marketing Manager
required_skills: Tech curiosity and passion for technology
Analytical mindset with data interpretation skills
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Cross-functional collaboration with globally distributed teams
GTM concepts product positioning and messaging frameworks
bonus_skills: Interest in open source and cloud technologies
Experience writing technical content or marketing copy
matched_skills: 4+ years product marketing experience (exceeds graduate level)
Analytical mindset with Power BI PL-300 KPI reporting
Excellent written communication (demo scripts positioning content strategy)
GTM strategy and product positioning ownership (GRG IPC)
Adaptability across multiple industries and markets
missing_skills: Open source or cloud technology background
Technical content writing portfolio (blog posts whitepapers)
Demand generation or digital marketing funnel experience
core_responsibilities: Contribute to GTM planning and execution of product launches across various sectors
Draft and edit compelling messaging and positioning for diverse target audiences
Assist in developing campaign plans and content dissemination strategies
Partner with demand generation and digital teams to optimize marketing funnels
Work with marketing team to coordinate webinars events and social media
Monitor competitive landscape and industry trends for product differentiation
recommended_emphasis: Lead with 4+ years B2B product marketing as evidence of exceeding graduate expectations
Highlight IoT and tech sector experience (IPC IoT solutions) as tech curiosity proof
Showcase product positioning and messaging frameworks (GRG Banking IPC)
Frame global distributed collaboration experience from multi-market EMEA and Asia roles
Surface competitive intelligence and market research capabilities
Quantify GTM results: 4.6M CNY contracts from 4 product launches
Position Power BI certification as analytical mindset evidence
